description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a sloped gable roof and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and access to a balcony and patio. The structure includes a prominent vertical stone accent wall and wooden trim under the roof eaves, adding warmth and contrast to the design. The house sits on a rectangular grassy plot with a single mature tree adjacent to one side, and the base is bordered by a low brick retaining wall. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a more solid appearance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped gable roof, large glass windows, stone and wood accents, and a grassy yard with a tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, balcony, patio, and the main stone accent wall.
description_view_1: Side view with the tree, secondary roof overhang, and fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain white wall and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single narrow window and the stone accent wall visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a glass door, small steps, and an overhanging roof with wood trim.
